title: It's All Coming Back to Me Now
album: All The Way...A Decade of Song
why_this_song: It's All Coming Back to Me Now by Celine Dion (1996) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 20 times; first heard in: "That it's all coming back to me"
Appears 20 times; first heard in: "That it's all coming back to me"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "There were nights when the wind was so cold"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "But when you touch me like this"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Baby, baby"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "it's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "coming" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "coming" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: That my body froze in bed
If you want me like this
It was more than all your laws allow

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: If I just listened to it
But it's all coming back to me
When you see me like this

exercises.prompt_en: "It's All Coming Back to Me Now" was released in 1996. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "It's All Coming Back to Me Now" foi lançada em 1996. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "It's All Coming Back to Me Now" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "It's All Coming Back to Me Now" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
